use_cases: Visualizing incident response funnel from events to resolution across tiers
Displaying multi-stage data conversion metrics in analytics dashboards
Monitoring operational metrics with layered breakdown in monitoring tools
Showing alert triage flow in incident management platforms
Presenting conversion funnel data in SaaS analytics products
ai_summary: A layered funnel chart component built with Reaviz that displays multi-tier data flow visualization with animated transitions. Features a dark theme with gradient magenta/pink color scheme, showing funnel stages from All Events through resolution tiers with supporting metric cards. Includes tooltip interactions and smooth Framer Motion animations for data reveals.
